Comment.value: Called from media with subtitles layout.
Can be called from either card window or standard window
import VTT and SRT only available in FAT Media Subtitle view

Calculation.Text: Case ( FAT Title::Original localisation code ≠ $$localisation_code; getLanguageCode ( $$localisation_code ) ; Case( FAT Title::Original localisation code ≠ FAT Media::Localisation code; FAT Media::Language code; FAT Title::Original language code ) )

Case ( FAT Title::Original localisation code ≠ $$localisation_code; getCountryCode ( $$localisation_code ) ; Case( FAT Title::Original localisation code ≠ FAT Media::Localisation code; FAT Media::Country code; FAT Title::Original country code ) )

"You are importing new subtitles to the localised version " & $$localisation_code & ".¶¶" & "Make sure your selected subtitle file is in this language version." & "¶¶" & "Any existing subtitles will be removed."
FAT Title::Original localisation code ≠ FAT Media::Localisation code

"You are importing new subtitles to the localised media with code " & $$localisation_code & ".¶¶" & "Make sure your selected subtitle file is in this language version." & "¶¶" & "Any existing subtitles will be removed."

Comment.value: Example $fileInfo result: file:3_3_quiz_test.en-global.vtt filemac:/Macintosh HD/Users/jensthorsen/Desktop/CMT Tester/TMH filmer & subtitles/content/video/3_3_quiz_test.en-global.vtt

Calculation.Text: ($format = "VTT" And PatternCount ( GetValue ( $importedSUB ; 1 ) ; "WEBVTT" )) Or ($format = "SRT" And GetAsNumber(GetValue ( $importedSUB ; 1 )) =1 )

Comment.value: Text in VTT can be on two lines

Calculation.Text: "Sorry but the content in the selected file does not seem to be a valid VTT or SRT file."
